title: Sponge Crafting
description: Adds a vanilla-friendly, ocean-themed crafting recipe for the uncraftable Sponge block.
body:
**🌊 Craftable Sponge** is a simple, lightweight datapack that finally gives the elusive **Sponge** a sensible crafting recipe, making it easier to acquire for large-scale water draining projects.

The new recipe is balanced to reflect the rarity and ocean-based origin of the Sponge:

| | 1 | 2 | 3 |
| :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| **A** | Slimeball | Yellow Dye | Slimeball |
| **B** | Yellow Dye | **Dried Kelp Block** | Yellow Dye |
| **C** | Slimeball | Yellow Dye | Slimeball |

![crafting ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab162a19d97847fcf5ac0ef0f69044375df37697.png)

**Required Ingredients:**
* 4 * **Yellow Dye**
* 4 * **Slimeball**
* 1 * **Dried Kelp Block**

**Why You Need This:**
* **Vanilla-Friendly:** The recipe feels like it could be part of the base game.
* **Utility:** Makes acquiring Sponges more consistent for terraforming and building.
* **Lightweight:** Zero lag and extremely easy to install.

No more tedious Ocean Monument raids just for a few sponges! Start building your underwater base today!
